steps.title: Start with the slope
steps.content:
A line with slope $$-\frac{1}{4}$$ has the form
$$y=-\frac{1}{4}x+b$$

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content:
Substitute the point $(8,5)$ into the equation and solve for $b$.
$$5=-\frac{1}{4}(8)+b$$
$$5=-2+b$$
$$b=7$$

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: The equation of the line is $$y=-\frac{x}{4}+7$$ The answer is D.
